ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer placing the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the order */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Shipping method used for the order */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Cost of shipping for the order */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  "coupon_code" TEXT /* Coupon code used for the order */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the order */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the item */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being ordered */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order that this item belongs to */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the item */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual delivery date of the item */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the item */,
  "shipping_cost" REAL /* Shipping cost for the item */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock available for the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level that triggers a reorder */,
  "reorder_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity to be ordered when the stock level falls below the reorder level */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address for customer contact */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order for which the payment was made */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was processed */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for the payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status (e.g., pending, paid, refunded) */,
  "refund_amount" REAL /* Amount refunded, if any */,
  "refund_date" TEXT /* Date of the refund, if any */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or instructions for the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)
